title: EvaluateOffersResponse
description: Response payload returned by the Offer Evaluation Agent after evaluating supplier offers for a procurement request. The schema avoids JSON Schema composition keywords so it can be used with OCI/OpenAI-compatible structured output.

request_id.description: Unique identifier of the procurement request that was evaluated.

examples: Supplier B was selected because it provides the lowest eligible cost and meets the required delivery date.
No supplier offer was selected because every offer was excluded by the evaluation policy.

EvaluationDecision.description: Structured decision produced by the evaluation agent. When status is selected_offer, selected_offer must contain the complete selected offer and reasons must be empty. When status is no_valid_offers, selected_offer must be an empty object and reasons must contain at least one reason. These cross-field rules are enforced by agent consistency checks.

selected_offer.description: Complete selected offer details when status is selected_offer. Use an empty object when status is no_valid_offers.

reasons.description: Policy exclusion reasons when status is no_valid_offers. Use an empty array when status is selected_offer.
examples: All offers have delivery dates later than the requested delivery date.
Some offers use a currency different from the request currency.

examples.explanation: Supplier B was selected because it provides the lowest eligible cost and meets the required delivery date.

reasons: All offers were excluded because their delivery dates are later than the requested delivery date.

examples.explanation: No supplier offer was selected because every offer was excluded by the evaluation policy.
